items.name: LLM-Safety-Verification
items.description: A robust framework for formal verification of multi-agent systems powered by LLMs, ensuring safe and reliable decision-making. Integrates machine learning with formal methods to validate agent behaviors, safety constraints, and real-world simulations in critical domains like autonomous driving and robotics.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: A-Decentralized-Framework-for-AI-based-Resource-Allocation-in-Open-RAN
items.description: A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

items.name: MIND-Crypt
items.description: A Machine Learning-Based Framework for Assessing Cryptographic Indistinguishability of Lightweight Block Ciphers

items.name: BioengineeringAgricultureRobots
items.description: Reinforcement learning framework for agricultural robots using n step and Double DQN policy learning to optimize spraying, planting, and harvesting decisions. Designed for integration with real machine vision pipelines to enable perception driven, resource efficient autonomous farm labor.

items.name: Multimodal-Machine-Learning-and-Data-Analysis-Framework-for-Depression-Detection
items.description: Master's thesis codebase for evaluation of fusion strategies in clinical depression screening. Multimodal depression detection framework using Text, Audio, and Video modalities with Early and Late Fusion strategies. Implements Logistic Regression and XGBoost classifiers on E-DAIC dataset with SHAP and coefficient-based methods.

items.name: GSM-Prediction-with-XAI
items.description: Physics-guided machine learning framework for accurate GSM prediction in Single Jersey knit fabric with SHAP-based explainability.

items.name: Minerva
items.description: Minerva is a framework for training machine learning models for researchers.

items.name: Space-Telemetry-for-LEO-Satellites
items.description: This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.

items.name: Breast_cancer_analysis
items.description: A clinical-grade machine learning pipeline for breast cancer diagnosis, paired with an interpretable feature framework to support medical decision-making.

items.name: Adaptive-Hybrid-Obfuscation-for-Privacy
items.description: A multi-level obfuscation framework (mild, moderate, strong) for privacy-preserving machine learning on network-traffic data. Includes dataset balancing, obfuscation scripts, TabNet models, baseline ML benchmarks, and reproducible experiments.

items.name: JUSTNature-utils
items.description: Auxiliary mechanisms compiled as a machine learning toolkit for the long-term curation of the Monitoring and Evaluating framework.

items.name: mlinternship
items.description: End-to-end ML pipeline for analyzing and mitigating bias in machine learning models. Features bias detection (SPD, EOD, DIR metrics), multiple classifiers (Random Forest, Logistic Regression, SVM), and a configurable YAML-driven training framework.

items.name: BribeMarket
items.description: Artificial-Intelligence driven Risk Governance framework empowers Scalable, Intelligent, Distributed Market Exchange, integrating Machine Learning.

items.name: Feasibility-Aware-ML-Energy-Materials
items.description: Feasibility-aware analysis of latent representations learned by multitask machine-learning models for electrochemical energy materials. The framework reveals domain structure, transferability limits, and data-supported performance regimes across porous carbons and MOFs.

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.name: Sustainable-approach-of-reduced-waste-using-Optimised-ml-Algorithm-for-predicting-crop-yields
items.description: This project presents a complete machine-learning framework designed to improve sustainable agriculture. It addresses the modern struggle with unpredictable crop yields, improper fertilizer application, and rising agricultural waste through an integrated approach combining Predictive Analytics and Computer Vision.

items.name: Doxorubicin-Nanocarrier-Toxicity-in-Normal-Cells
items.description: A Physics-Informed Machine Learning Framework for Predicting and Mitigating Doxorubicin Nanocarrier Toxicity in Normal Cells

items.name: industrial-learning-agent
items.description: Development of a multi-agent system architecture designed to build machine learning pipelines using automatic machine learning frameworks

items.name: behavioral-biometrics-fraud-detection-ml
items.description: A Multi-Layered Security Framework for Digital Payments: Behavioral Biometrics-Based Fraud Detection Using Machine Learning.”  The objective of the research is to enhance digital payment security by combining behavioral biometrics with machine learning - based fraud detection.

items.name: Financial-State-Tracker
items.description: A project builds a financial state tracking framework for listed companies using financial ratios and unsupervised machine learning techniques. The project focuses on clustering firms by financial characteristics, analyzing state migration over time, and supporting firm screening for research and portfolio management reference.

items.name: ryzen-ai-documentation
items.description: Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI technology.

items.name: geospatial-ai-machine-learning
items.description: Production-grade geospatial artificial intelligence and machine learning framework for environmental modeling and water quality prediction using satellite, climate and in-situ data.

items.name: Prism
items.description: An advanced threat detection framework that integrates signature-based matching with machine learning anomaly detection to identify zero-day vulnerabilities. It features a distributed ML pipeline utilizing secure aggregation for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing and custom-built parsers to normalize logs

items.name: PhaseLearner
items.description: PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.

items.description: A hierarchical machine learning framework using Random Forest to classify cancer cell line lineage and subtype from pan-cancer proteomic maps. Demonstrates high-dimensional data preprocessing, EDA (PCA/t-SNE/UMAP), and biomarker identification.

items.name: Churn-Analysis-Project-in-Telecom-Industry
items.description: In competitive industries like telecoms, retaining customers is as vital as gaining them. Using real-world data, this churn research project analyzes why users leave and how to stop it. By leveraging machine learning and predictive modeling, I translate data into business strategies, creating a framework to maintain an engaged, loyal customer base.

items.name: Stock-Prediction-Project
items.description: A Python-based machine learning framework that predicts Tesla's daily stock returns by combining FinBERT transformer sentiment analysis of Elon Musk's tweets with traditional OHLCV technical indicators. The sentiment-enhanced model achieved a statistically significant R² improvement of 0.5% over the baseline, validated through bootstrap resampling.

items.description: This application bridges the gap between complex machine learning and accessible health technology. It leverages state-of-the-art predictive modeling and explainability frameworks to provide transparent diagnostic insights.  The Predictive Engine: XGBoost At the core of this tool is an eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) classifier.

items.description: An image analysis framework, Fibril Analysis for Cellulose Technology (FACT), which utilizes machine learning (ML) segmentation and morphological thinning, to measure the fibril width distribution of cellulose nanofibers (CNFs) from negative contrast scanning electron microscopy (NegC-SEM) images. This application was developed in Mathematica V13.

Uses Django framework that uses forms to get passenger details from user and predicts survival using ML model and shows results to user. Prediction details and passenger results are saved in the database.

items.name: CircumSpectrum
items.description: CircumSpectrum is a flux-based framework that converts bulk and single-cell RNA-seq data into metabolic fingerprints using genome-scale models and machine learning. It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.

items.name: PROFILE-HUNTER-A-SMART-FRAMEWORK-FOR-IDENTIFYING-SOCIAL-MEDIA-IMPERSONATION-USING-MACHINE-LEARNING
items.description: Online social networks have permeated our social lives in the current generation. These sites have allowed  us to see our social lives differently than they did in the past. Nowadays we can connect with new friends  and maintain relationships with them via social and personal activities become quite easy.

items.name: Expo_climate_risk
items.description: This project implements a data-driven framework to measure and analyze corporate exposure to climate risks using statistical and machine learning techniques.

items.name: masfi
items.description: Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.

items.name: ethos-ai

It focuses on ensuring that machine learning models are not just efficient, but also fair, transparent, and accountable.

Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinson’s disease trajectories.

items.name: ml-pipeline-core
items.description: Machine learning data pipeline and model training framework

items.name: mathematics_of_machine_learning
items.description: A from-scratch Machine Learning reviewer library focused on understanding the math behind the code. Built as a learning project featuring custom implementations of core algorithms, gradient descent, and model evaluation without relying heavily on high-level ML frameworks.

items.name: AI
items.description: 🤖 Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

items.description: This repository contains all the necessary supplimentary data of our research work: "Toward a Glass-Box Framework: Interpretable and Statistically Validated Machine Learning for Geopolymer Concrete Strength Prediction"

items.description: A lightweight distillation framework that compresses complex classical models into interpretable students while preserving both predictive accuracy and explanation fidelity.

items.description: RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.

items.name: pac_learning
items.description: probably approximately correct (PAC) learning is a framework for mathematical analysis of machine learning

items.name: world_cup_modelling
items.description: A probabilistic forecasting framework for the 2026 FIFA World Cup built using historical international match data, statistical goal models, machine learning benchmarks, and full tournament Monte Carlo simulation.  This project focuses on probability quality, model comparison, and realistic tournament forecasting under uncertainty.

items.name: NMT
items.description: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) is an AI framework for automatically translating text between languages using deep learning models. It leverages sequence-to-sequence architectures, attention mechanisms, and transformer-based models to deliver accurate, context-aware, and scalable translation across multiple languages in real time.

items.name: Real-Time-Anomaly-Detection-in-loT-Network
items.description: Real-Time Anomaly Detection in IoT Networks is a streaming analytics framework that monitors IoT device data to detect anomalies, failures, and security threats in real time. It leverages statistical methods and machine learning to identify unusual patterns, trigger alerts, and ensure system reliability, safety, and operational continuity.

items.name: Evaluation-as-a-Service-EaaS-
items.description: Evaluation-as-a-Service (EaaS) is a scalable, production-ready evaluation platform designed to standardize, automate, and operationalize model assessment across machine learning and AI systems. It provides a centralized framework for benchmarking, monitoring, and validating model performance through reproducible, API-driven evaluation workflows.

items.name: Drift-Aware-Retraining-Pipeline
items.description: Drift Aware Retraining Pipeline is a production-ready machine learning infrastructure framework designed to detect data and concept drift and automatically trigger intelligent model retraining workflows. The system ensures sustained model performance in dynamic, real-world environments where data distributions continuously evolve.

items.name: causal-decision-framework
items.description: Bridging the gap between Machine Learning and Causal Inference with rigorous experimental design in R

items.name: social-twins
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: ecommerce-product-categorization-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for multi-class product categorization in e-commerce using structured metadata and textual features. Combines TF-IDF, transformer embeddings (MiniLM), and ensemble models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost, MLP) to predict hierarchical product categories with strong F1 performance.

items.name: Multi-Level-
items.description: A two-stage hierarchical stacking framework for Mineral Prospectivity Modeling (MPM) using ensemble machine learning methods.

items.name: PhiFlow
items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: atlas-dataflow
items.description: Atlas DataFlow é um framework contrato-driven para construção de pipelines analíticos modulares, auditáveis e adaptáveis. Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domínio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integração consistente entre análise de dados, modelagem estatística e aplicações de machine learning.

items.name: SmartInvoiceExtract
items.description: Smart Invoice Extract is a premium iOS application designed to simplify expense tracking. Leveraging on-device machine learning (Vision Framework), it instantly extracts data from invoices and receipts, organizing them into a beautiful, searchable history.

items.name: -Cardiovascular-Risk-Stratification-and-Prognostic-Modeling-Framework-Using-Advanced-ML
items.description: Heart disease is a leading cause of mortality, making early diagnosis crucial. Traditional methods are time-consuming and costly, but machine learning (ML) can improve accuracy and efficiency. ML models, such as Decision Trees, SVM, Random Forest, and Neural Networks, analyze patient data like age to predict heart disease risk.

items.name: Machine_Learning_Project
items.description: Questa repository contiene un framework  per la classificazione e l'analisi di stati quantistici bipartiti. Il progetto mira a distinguere gli stati quantistici in base a due proprietà fondamentali: l'Entanglement (tramite il criterio PPT) e la Non-località (tramite la violazione delle disuguaglianze di Bell).

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.
